params._factory: Store factory used for per-user deployment stores.
params._registrar: Address of the ERC721 registrar for base nodes.
params._reverseResolver: Address of the Dotns reverse resolver contract.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

owner(bytes32).details: For tokenised nodes (sentinel owner), returns the ERC721 owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setOwner(bytes32,address,address).details: Callable only by the configured `registrarController`.      Implementations SHOULD use the sentinel owner pattern:      - store owner as address(0) to derive ownership from the ERC721 registrar.

params.newOwner: New owner address for event emission and validation.
params.resolverAddr: Resolver address to set for the node.

setResolver(bytes32,address).details: Callable only by the current node owner.      For tokenised nodes, authorisation is based on ERC721 owner/approvals.

setSubnodeOwner((bytes32,string,string,a.details: Callable only by the current owner of `parentNode`.      Reverts if the derived subnode already exists.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateRegistrarController(address).details: Callable only by the registry owner.

params.registrarController: Address of the registrar controller contract.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

dotnsRegistrar().notice: ERC721 registrar backing base node ownership.

owner(bytes32).notice: Returns the owner of a node.

registrarController().notice: Address authorised to perform privileged node writes.

resolver(bytes32).notice: Returns the resolver of a node.

setOwner(bytes32,address,address).notice: Creates a node record for a tokenised base registration.

setResolver(bytes32,address).notice: Sets or clears the resolver for a node.

setSubnodeOwner((bytes32,string,string,a.notice: Creates a new subnode and assigns its owner.

updateRegistrarController(address).notice: Sets the registrar controller used for privileged node writes.

documentation.text: @notice Mapping of node identifiers to records.
@notice Address authorised to perform privileged node writes.
@notice ERC721 registrar backing base node ownership.
@notice DotNS reverse resolver.
@notice Factory for per-user Store instances.
@dev Reserved storage space to allow for layout changes in the future.

@notice Restricts access to the current owner of `node`.
 @param node Node identifier.
@notice Restricts access to the configured registrar controller.
@custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow constructor
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistry
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistry
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistry
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistry
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistry
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistry
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistry
@notice Internal check for registrar controller privileges.

@notice Returns implementation version.
 @return versionString Current version string.
@inheritdoc UUPSUpgradeable
